review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup Junior A semifinal in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, advancing to the final against the Humboldt Broncos.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup Junior A semifinal on Thursday night in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Richmond, which advanced from round-robin play with a 2-1 record, will face the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in the sudden-death final on Saturday night. Goals were scored by Dean Rutledge, Steve Jaques, Matt Hervey, Brian Kozak, Paul Rutherford, Jason Phillips, Tony Bobbitt, Mike McCormick, and Bill Hardy. The article is a Canadian Press wire report with no byline or headline visible in the OCR.
review.notes: No headline or byline appears in the OCR — the content is a CP wire dispatch. The AI-invented headline should be removed. Goal scorers are listed in the OCR and should be included in the long description for historical completeness.
